title: asphodeline damascena subsp. rugosa
intro: Asphodeline damascena subsp. rugosa, also known as the yellow asphodel or yellow asphodeline, is a perennial plant native to the Mediterranean region, belonging to the Asphodelaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it a valuable remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Asphodeline damascena subsp. rugosa include its ability to treat colds, coughs, and respiratory problems, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. In herbal preparations, the plant's rhizome is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments, including fever and skin conditions.
